item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p05","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer opens with a default refusal to add another manual gate, recognizes the repeated pattern of downstream human checks after each error, moves the diagnosis upstream to data quality/rule validation/ownership, and proposes unified upstream attribution and one-time controls instead of another reviewer.
